eval_dimensions.name: spec-first-enforcement
eval_dimensions.description: Skill blocks code edits when no spec update has happened

eval_dimensions.name: classification-gate
eval_dimensions.description: Step 2 uses AskUserQuestion (not plain text) to classify the change

eval_dimensions.name: missing-spec-handling
eval_dimensions.description: Skill stops gracefully when docs/specs/<TICKET-ID>.md is absent

eval_dimensions.name: regeneration-handoff
eval_dimensions.description: After spec is updated, skill delegates to Dev10x:work-on for code regeneration

eval_dimensions.name: drift-verification
eval_dimensions.description: Skill runs Dev10x:spec-sync --check-only at the end to confirm code matches spec

input.change_description: Discount codes must support per-customer usage limits, not just global limits
Rename DiscountService to PromotionService — no behavior changes
